title: Wookiee warblade
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:FreyyrInTheShadowlands-KOTOR.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Freyyr]] with his warblade.]]
The '''Wookiee Warblade''' was a common weapon among [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] warriors who would wield the blade in constant motion, allowing for deadly strikes. The warblade was a cumbersome weapon for non-Wookiees but was perfectly wieldy for the Wookiees who carried them. This melee weapon was seen among warriors during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. One was seen on [[Lehon/Legends|Lehon]] in [[3956 BBY]].<ref name="KOTOR">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Although it is a double-bladed weapon, there is a glitch in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' that allows the player to wield it in one hand, with another weapon in the other hand.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
